---
title: "PPE Empirical Coverage Under Competing Risks"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)

source("../plots/ecr_graph_function.R")
source("../plots/absolute_bias_graph_function.R")
source("../plots/bias_graph_function.R")
source("../plots/rmse_graph_function.R")
source("../plots/PPviz_parallel_function.R")

results_df <- read_csv("tables/final_results_complete.csv")
```

## Empirical Coverage

```{r fig-ecr-coverage, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PPE empirical coverage under competing risks."}
plot_ecr(results_df)
```


## Absolute Bias

```{r fig-absolute-bias, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PPE bias under competing risks."}
plot_absolute_bias(results_df)
```


## Bias

```{r fig-bias, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PPE bias under competing risks."}
plot_bias(results_df)
```


## Root Mean Square Error

```{r fig-rmse, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="PPE root mean square error under competing risks."}
plot_rmse(results_df)
```


## Pohar-Perme Visualization by Lambda Scenario

```{r fig-ppviz-all-lambdas, fig.width=9, fig.height=6, fig.cap="Pohar-Perme versus theoretical net survival by lambda scenario.", cache=TRUE}
lambda_files <- list.files(
  "data",
  pattern = "^simulated_cohort_lambda_.*\\.rds$",
  full.names = FALSE
)

lambda_values <- lambda_files |>
  stringr::str_remove("^simulated_cohort_lambda_") |>
  stringr::str_remove("\\.rds$") |>
  as.numeric() |>
  sort()

for (lambda_val in lambda_values) {
  plot_ppviz_parallel(
    lambda_scenario = lambda_val,
    data_dir = "data",
    metrics_dir = "tables",
    max_time = 5,
    beta_age = 0.02,
    beta_sex = 0,
    n_plot = 20,
    use_parallel = TRUE
  )
}
```
